app.name: dbt-osmosis
app.one_liner: A CLI tool that enhances dbt developer workflows through automated YAML management, documentation generation, and AI-assisted modeling.

screens.name: Streamlit Playground
screens.purpose: Provide an interactive web interface to explore dbt-osmosis features without local setup.

rust_commands.name: generate
rust_commands.purpose: Automatically generate dbt model files and associated YAML documentation based on database schema.

rust_commands.name: nl
rust_commands.purpose: Enable natural language queries to assist in model or test creation using LLM integration.

rust_commands.name: test-llm
rust_commands.purpose: Generate dbt tests using large language models based on column semantics and data profiles.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement core YAML synchronization logic
week 1: Integrate with dbt catalog metadata
week 1: Set up Streamlit playground scaffolding
acceptance_tests: CLI successfully generates YAML files matching database schema without manual intervention.
Natural language command `nl` produces valid dbt model code from text prompts.
Streamlit app loads and allows interactive model preview without local installation.
